summary: Iteration 39 - ALL FEATURES VERIFIED. Testing key fixes: 1) Transaction exclusion restore, 2) GHL sales create revenue transactions with ABONNEMENTS category, 3) Dashboard dynamic revenue calculation, 4) Label changed from Cotisations to Abonnements, 5) Sidebar badges working correctly.

transactions_page.abonnements_card: PASS - Shows 1'947.00 CHF (not COTISATIONS - label correctly changed)

caroline_maerten_transaction.visible: PASS - 'Vente 6 Week Challenge - Caroline Maerten' visible

remove_from_exclusions.response_message: PASS - Returns 'Transaction restaurée' with transaction object

recalculate_kpi.dynamic_calculation: PASS - Sums revenue/expense columns from categories

sidebar_badges.bilans_suivis: PASS - BLUE badge '1' (upcoming/cette semaine) + RED badge '1' (overdue/en retard)

label_change.cotisations_to_abonnements: PASS - Label changed from 'Cotisations' to 'Abonnements' in dashboard chart and transactions page

seed_data_creation: Backend tests use TEST_ prefixed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 39 features verified: 1) Dashboard shows Revenue 1947 CHF, Expenses 350 CHF, Net Profit 1597 CHF, Margin 82%. 2) Transactions page shows ABONNEMENTS card with 1947 CHF (not COTISATIONS). 3) All 4 GHL transactions have type='revenue' and category='ABONNEMENTS'. 4) Caroline Maerten +599 CHF transaction visible. 5) Remove from exclusions restores transaction. 6) Recalculate KPI dynamically sums from categories. 7) Sidebar badges: Paiements RED(2), Bilans/Suivis BLUE(1)+RED(1), Onboarding BLUE(9). 8) Annual reviews overdue/upcoming endpoints working. Current data: 5 transactions (4 revenue, 1 expense), 1 excluded transaction.
